name_cn:
Genuine quality
GUCCI 1955 horsebit bag retro horsebit closure handbag. Gucci's retro trend is back, and designers and fashionistas are showing the correct way to enjoy G's style. Classic horsebit + monogram + brown trim design, full of retro vibes. The retro brown is super easy on the eyes. Little fairies who love retro matching must get this 🤘
Style No.: 602204, Dimensions: 25.5x18x6cm
